productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Navy Blue White Casual Shoes
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are known as Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of shoes from Converse were initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into hot casual wear favourites.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityZebra print for style with Chuck Taylor logo on inner ankleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitSynthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fitHigh ankle for snug ft and added support to the ankleMidsoleCushioned fabric footbed for comfort and breathabilityOutsoleReinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durabilityVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionWaffle pattern outsole for superior grip on all terrainsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
